svg.aria-label: RTBO final live test checklist screenshot

g.text: ✓ Home page loads on desktop, tablet, and mobile
✓ Navigation, theme switcher, modals, and forms work
✓ Contact and newsletter records save to database
✓ Registration requires profile photo and waiver agreement
✓ Registration PDF includes photo, logo, fields, and signatures
✓ Applicant, Super Admin, and secondary admin receive emails
✓ PayPal order capture returns to payment-success.php
✓ Profile update, profile photo, password change, and logout work
